title: Bug Hunt Bakery
short_description: Every recipe is a program with one buggy step — read the steps like a coder and squash the bug!
description: Chef Croissant writes all his recipes as step-by-step programs — but a cheeky bug has crawled into every single one! Read the steps like a real programmer and tap the ONE step that would ruin the recipe: is it a silly wrong ingredient (toothpaste on toast?), a step in the wrong order (slicing bread before it's baked?), or a sneaky logic bug (a loop that repeats 100 times, or an IF that's backwards)? Every squash explains exactly why that step was the bug. Younger players hunt silly bugs; older players debug ordering and loop-and-conditional logic — the real thinking behind fixing code. A free online debugging and computational-thinking game for kids in grades 1–5, with speed and streak bonuses feeding your score and GP.
controls: Mouse / tap the step that contains the bug before the timer runs out.
